title: Kirloskar Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kirloskar Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
